quick_skim.title: SparseOcc++: Geometry-Aware Sparse Latent Representation for Semantic Occupancy Prediction
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-based 3D semantic occupancy prediction is essential for autonomous driving, yet dense voxel representations waste computation on largely empty space, while BEV and TPV projections compromise fine-grained 3D structure. Fully sparse representations offer an attractive alternative, but existing methods, including SparseOcc, entangle scene completion with semantic prediction by indiscriminately propagating high-dimensional features into empty regions and applying voxel-wise classification. This creates excessive activations, computational overhead, and geometric ambiguity. We present SparseOcc++, a geometry-aware sparse framework that explicitly decouples scene completion from semantic segmentation. SparseOcc++ reformulates completion as signed-distance regression on sparse anchor voxels through a scene completion field (SCF). To model complex outdoor geometry robustly, it combines orthogonal decomposition with discretized distance learning. A geometry-guided propagation module then converts the SCF into a complete volumetric scene and restricts semantic segmentation to geometrically verified regions. Experiments establish new state of the art: SparseOcc++ improves IoU by 2.3 points and is 3.9x faster than SparseOcc on nuScenes, while achieving a 5.9x speedup over OccFormer on SemanticKITTI.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: vision-based 3D occupancy prediction, related to pure visual 3D perception without LiDAR
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于视觉的3D占用预测，与无LiDAR纯视觉3D感知相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于视觉的3D占用预测，与无LiDAR纯视觉3D感知相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于视觉的3D占用预测，与无LiDAR纯视觉3D感知相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a geometry-aware sparse framework for vision-based 3D semantic occupancy prediction, decoupling scene completion from semantic segmentation to reduce computation and geometric ambiguity.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有密集体素表示计算浪费而BEV/TPV损失精细结构的问题，提出SparseOcc++框架，显式解耦场景补全与语义分割。通过稀疏潜在表示避免空区域特征传播，大幅降低计算开销并消除几何歧义。在多个占用预测基准上达到最优精度与效率平衡，为自动驾驶3D场景理解提供高效稀疏方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有密集体素表示计算浪费而BEV/TPV损失精细结构的问题，提出SparseOcc++框架，显式解耦场景补全与语义分割。通过稀疏潜在表示避免空区域特征传播，大幅降低计算开销并消除几何歧义。在多个占用预测基准上达到最优精度与效率平衡，为自动驾驶3D场景理解提供高效稀疏方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 使用nuScenes数据集的多视角纯视觉3D目标检测相关论文, especially work that connects or combines: nuScenes dataset for autonomous driving; 3D object detection methods; nuScenes multi-view camera-only 3D detection; 3D object detection on nuScenes dataset; pure visual 3D detection without LiDAR; research papers on 3D object detection using the nuScenes dataset; nuScenes multi view camera only 3D object detection papers; multi view 3D object detection on nuScenes dataset; pure visual 3D detection using nuScenes.
